sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Clicking on the G strip was no_impact. I have 3 actions left. Let me think about what I haven't tried yet.
I've tried:
- Clicking on all 4 U-shapes (green left, green right, yellow top, yellow bottom)
- Clicking on red dots in bars
- Clicking on red cross patterns
- Clicking on container borders
- Clicking on G strips between containers
- Clicking on the G strip to the left of the green bar
What I haven't tried:
- Clicking on the G strip above the yellow bar (row 27, col 10)
- Clicking on the G strip between yellow containers (row 41, col 24)
- Clicking on the bars themselves (not the red dots)
- Clicking on empty black areas
Let me try clicking on the yellow bar itself (not the red dot). The yellow bar is at rows 28-32, cols 9-11. The red dot is at [31, 10]. So I could click on [29, 10] or [30, 10] or [32, 10].
Actually, wait. Let me reconsider the problem entirely. I have 4 states (0, 2, 4, 8) representing the 4 bar configurations. I've visited all of them. None completed the level.
But what if the goal is to reach a state where BOTH bars are shrunk (state 8) AND then do something specific? Or what if the goal is to reach state 8 and then click on something that only works when both bars are shrunk?
Actually, I'm currently at state 8. Let me try clicking on the red cross patterns or red dots from this state. Maybe they only work when both bars are shrunk.
Let me try clicking on the red cross pattern near the green bar. The cross is at rows 9-11, cols 51-53. The center is at [10, 52].
Wait, I already tried clicking on the red cross patterns from state 0 and they were no_impact. But maybe they work differently from state 8.
Actually, let me try clicking on the yellow bar itself (not the red dot). The yellow bar is at rows 28-32, cols 9-11. Let me click on [29, 10].
